---
name: Rulof P.
surname: Burger
position: "Professor of Economics · D.Phil (Oxon)"
address: "Department of Economics, CGW Schumann Building, Stellenbosch University, Matieland 7602"
phone: +27 (0)21 808 2328
email: "rulof@sun.ac.za"
www: "rulofburger.github.io"
github: "rulofburger"
linkedin: "rulof-burger-11562586"
googlescholar: "vyGCfDoAAAAJ"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %Y')`"
headcolor: "3d6b52"
docname: "Curriculum Vitae"
output:
  vitae::awesomecv:
    page_total: true
    keep_tex: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(vitae)
library(tibble)
```

# Current Positions

```{r positions}
tribble(
  ~role, ~institution, ~dates, ~details,
  "Professor of Economics", "Stellenbosch University, Department of Economics", "Jul 2021 -- present",
    "Teaching: Microeconomics (Honours/Masters); Advanced Econometrics (Graduate); Labour Economics (Graduate/3rd year); Development Economics",
  "Founding Director", "Predictive Insights", "2018 -- present",
    "Machine learning product design studio providing demand forecasts and predictive analytics (predictiveinsights.co.za)",
  "Affiliated Professor", "Abdul Latif Jameel Poverty Action Lab (J-PAL), MIT", "2020 -- present",
    "Affiliated researcher conducting randomised evaluations to inform anti-poverty policy",
) |>
  detailed_entries(
    what  = role,
    when  = dates,
    with  = institution,
    why   = details
  )
```

# Previous Positions

```{r prev-positions}
tribble(
  ~role, ~institution, ~dates,
  "Associate Professor", "Stellenbosch University, Department of Economics", "Jul 2015 -- Jun 2021",
  "Senior Lecturer", "Stellenbosch University, Department of Economics", "2007 -- 2015",
  "Visiting Scholar", "Harvard University, Department of Economics", "2016",
  "Short-term Contract Researcher", "The World Bank, Washington D.C.", "2004, 2008, 2011, 2017, 2021",
  "Short-term Contract Researcher", "UNU-WIDER and SA National Treasury", "2014",
  "Short-term Contract Researcher", "Department of Trade and Industry, South Africa", "2006, 2007",
  "Lecturer", "St Clare's College, Oxford (Economic Principles; International Economics)", "2008 -- 2009",
  "Tutor", "Mansfield College, Oxford (Undergraduate Labour Economics)", "2009",
  "Lecturer", "University of Cape Town, Department of Economics", "2003, 2013",
) |>
  detailed_entries(
    what  = role,
    when  = dates,
    with  = institution
  )
```

# NRF Rating

```{r nrf}
tribble(
  ~rating, ~dates,
  "C-rated Researcher (Established Researcher)", "2021 -- 2026",
  "Y-rated Researcher (Promising Young Researcher)", "2015 -- 2020",
) |>
  detailed_entries(what = rating, when = dates)
```

# Education

```{r education}
tribble(
  ~degree, ~institution, ~dates, ~details,
  "D.Phil in Economics", "University of Oxford", "2007 -- 2012",
    c("Dissertation: Estimating the shape of the South African schooling earnings profile",
      "Supervisor: Francis Teal; Examiners: Steve Bond and Jan Willem Gunning",
      "Passed coursework with distinction"),
  "M.Phil in Economics", "University of Cambridge", "2003 -- 2004",
    c("Passed with distinction",
      "Awarded Nedbank/Old Mutual Budget Speech Competition Cambridge Scholarship"),
  "M.Comm in Economics", "Stellenbosch University", "2002 -- 2003",
    c("Passed with distinction",
      "Awarded prize for best Master's student in Economics",
      "Ernst and Ethel Eriksen Scholarship"),
  "B.Comm (Hons) in Economics", "Stellenbosch University", "2001 -- 2002",
    c("Passed with distinction",
      "S.A. Cloete Medal for best post-graduate student in Economics",
      "Finansies & Tegniek prize for best Honours student in Economics"),
  "B.Comm in Mathematics", "Stellenbosch University", "1997 -- 2000",
    c(""),
) |>
  detailed_entries(
    what  = degree,
    when  = dates,
    with  = institution,
    why   = details
  )
```

# Publications

## Forthcoming

```{r forthcoming}
tribble(
  ~authors, ~title, ~journal,
  "Abel M. & Burger R.P.", "Name-Based Race Discrimination: The Role of Heuristics", "Review of Economics and Statistics",
  "Abel M. & Burger R.P.", "Choice Over Payment Schemes and Worker Effort", "Experimental Economics",
) |>
  detailed_entries(
    what = title,
    with = authors,
    where = journal
  )
```

## Journal Articles

```{r journal-articles}
tribble(
  ~authors, ~year, ~title, ~journal,
  "Khan Z., Patel L., Graham L., Burger R.P., Chowa G.A. & Masa R.", "2024",
    "Youth Employability Programmes in South Africa: Which Features Work Best and for Whom?",
    "Development Southern Africa, 41(1), 207--224",
  "Botha B., Burger R.P., Kotzé K., Rankin N. & Steenkamp D.", "2023",
    "Big Data Forecasting of South African Inflation",
    "Empirical Economics, 65, 149--188",
  "Rossouw L., Burger R.P. & Burger R.", "2021",
    "Testing an Incentive-Based and Community Health Worker Package Intervention to Improve Maternal Health and Nutrition Outcomes: A Pilot RCT",
    "Maternal and Child Health Journal, 25(12), 1913--1922",
  "Abel M., Burger R.P. & Piraino P.", "2020",
    "The Value of Reference Letters: Experimental Evidence from South Africa",
    "American Economic Journal: Applied Economics, 12(3), 40--71",
  "Abel M., Burger R.P., Carranza E. & Piraino P.", "2019",
    "Bridging the Intention-Behavior Gap? The Effect of Plan-Making Prompts on Job Search and Employment",
    "American Economic Journal: Applied Economics, 11(2), 1--19",
  "Burger R., Burger R.P. & Rossouw L.", "2019",
    "An Incentive-Based and Community Health Worker Package Intervention to Improve Early Utilization of Antenatal Care",
    "Maternal and Child Health Journal, 23(5), 633--640",
  "Burger R.P. & McLaren Z.", "2017",
    "An Econometric Method for Estimating Population Parameters from Non-Random Samples: An Application to Clinical Case Finding",
    "Health Economics, 26, 1110--1122",
  "Burger R.P., Coetzee L.C., Kreuser C.F. & Rankin N.A.", "2017",
    "Income and Price Elasticities of Demand in South Africa: An Application of the Linear Expenditure System",
    "South African Journal of Economics, 85(4), 491--514",
  "Burger R.P. & Teal F.J.", "2015",
    "The Effect of Schooling on Worker Productivity: Evidence from a South African Industry Panel",
    "Journal of African Economies, 24(5), 629--644",
  "Burger R.P., van der Berg S. & von Fintel D.", "2015",
    "The Unintended Consequences of Education Policies on South African Participation and Unemployment",
    "South African Journal of Economics, 83(1), 74--100",
  "Burger R.P. & von Fintel D.", "2014",
    "Rising Unemployment in a Growing Economy: A Business Cycle, Generational and Life-Cycle Perspective",
    "Studies in Economics and Econometrics, 38(1), 35--64",
  "Burger R.P., Burger R. & Rossouw L.", "2012",
    "The Fertility Transition in South Africa: A Retrospective Panel Data Analysis",
    "Development Southern Africa, 29(5), 738--755",
  "Burger R.P. & De Villiers P.", "2005",
    "The Macroeconomic Impact of HIV/AIDS in South Africa: A Supply-Side Analysis",
    "Journal for Studies in Economics and Econometrics, 29, 1--14",
  "Burger R.P. & Woolard I.", "2005",
    "The State of the Labour Market in South Africa after the First Decade of Democracy",
    "Journal of Vocational Education and Training, 57(4), 453--476",
  "Burger R.P. & Yu D.", "2006",
    "Wage Trends in Post-Apartheid South Africa: Constructing an Earnings Series from Household Survey Data",
    "Labour Market Frontiers, 8, 1--8",
) |>
  detailed_entries(
    what  = title,
    when  = year,
    with  = authors,
    where = journal
  )
```

## Book Chapters

```{r chapters}
tribble(
  ~authors, ~year, ~title, ~book,
  "Burger R.P., Jafta R. & von Fintel D.", "2022",
    "The Effectiveness of Affirmative Action Policies in South Africa",
    "Handbook on Economics of Discrimination and Affirmative Action, Springer, Singapore",
  "Pieters J., Kujundzic A., Burger R. & Gondwe J.", "2021",
    "Inequality at Risk of Automation? Gender Differences in Routine Tasks Intensity in Developing Country Labor Markets",
    "Cracking the Future of Work: Automation and Labor Platforms in the Global South",
  "Burger R.P. & Makaluza N.", "2018",
    "Job-Seeker Entry into the Two-Tiered Informal Sector in South Africa",
    "The South African Informal Sector: Creating Jobs, Reducing Poverty. HSRC Press",
  "Burger R.P. & Jafta R.C.C.", "2012",
    "Affirmative Action in South Africa: An Empirical Assessment of the Impact on Labour Market Outcomes",
    "Affirmative Action in Plural Societies. Palgrave Macmillan",
  "Black P., Jafta R.C.C. & Burger R.P.", "2010",
    "Black Economic Empowerment",
    "South Africa: Economy and Policy 1990--2000. Manchester University Press",
  "Von Fintel D.P. & Burger R.P.", "2009",
    "The South African Labour Market in the Global Financial Crisis: Recovering Lost Gains",
    "Economic Transformation Audit 2009. African Minds / IJR",
  "Burger R., Burger R.P. & Du Plessis S.", "2007",
    "Assessing NEPAD as a Growth Strategy: A Bayesian Averaging of Classical Estimates Approach",
    "NEPAD and the Future of Economic Policy in Africa. Africa World Press",
) |>
  detailed_entries(
    what  = title,
    when  = year,
    with  = authors,
    where = book
  )
```

# Research Funding

```{r funding}
tribble(
  ~year, ~funder, ~project, ~role,
  "2022", "World Bank",
    "Measurement Error and Dynamics of Wellbeing: Better Data and Methods for Tracking Global Poverty", "Principal Investigator",
  "2019", "IDRC",
    "Future of Work in the Global South", "Principal Investigator",
  "2015", "UNU-WIDER",
    "Affirmative Action in South Africa", "Principal Investigator",
  "2014", "World Bank",
    "Randomised Control Trial: Skill Certification and Job Counselling", "Principal Investigator",
  "2014", "PSPPD II (National Presidency / EU)",
    "Randomised Control Trial: Job Counselling, Productivity Signals and Employment", "Principal Investigator",
  "2014", "Broadreach Healthcare & J-PAL Africa",
    "Pilot Study: Thula Baba Box Maternal and Infant Health Intervention", "Principal Investigator",
  "2014", "REDI (Research on Employment, Income Distribution and Inclusive Growth)",
    "South African Unemployment and Employment", "Team Leader",
  "2013", "Stellenbosch University Elite Research Grant",
    "Causal Effect of Schooling Investment on Worker Productivity", "Principal Investigator",
  "2012", "J-PAL Africa (CALIE)",
    "Pilot Study: Job Counselling, Productivity Signals and Employment", "Principal Investigator",
) |>
  detailed_entries(
    what  = project,
    when  = year,
    with  = funder,
    why   = role
  )
```

# Awards & Honours

```{r awards}
tribble(
  ~year, ~award,
  "2021--26", "NRF C-rated Researcher (Established Researcher)",
  "2015--20", "NRF Y-rated Researcher (Promising Young Researcher)",
  "2015", "HB & MJ Thom Award for Sabbatical Study",
  "2015", "Oppenheimer Memorial Trust Award for Sabbatical Study",
  "2012--15", "Rector's Award, Stellenbosch University",
  "2006--07", "Nominated for Golden Key Best Lecturer Award, Stellenbosch University",
  "2003--06", "Departmental Teaching Award, Stellenbosch University",
  "2003", "Prize for Best Master's Student in Economics, Stellenbosch University",
  "2002", "Nedbank/Old Mutual Budget Speech Competition Cambridge Scholarship",
  "2002", "Ernst and Ethel Eriksen Scholarship for Master's Studies",
  "2002", "S.A. Cloete Medal for Best Post-Graduate Student in Economics",
  "2002", "Finansies & Tegniek Prize for Best Honours Student in Economics",
  "1997, 2001--2", "Merit Bursaries, Stellenbosch University",
) |>
  brief_entries(what = award, when = year)
```

# PhD Students Supervised

```{r phd-students}
tribble(
  ~name, ~year, ~status,
  "Dieter von Fintel",      "2015",    "Completed",
  "Marisa von Fintel",      "2015",    "Completed",
  "Hendrik van Broekhuizen","2016",    "Completed",
  "Asmus Zoch",             "2017",    "Completed",
  "Kholekile Malindi",      "2019",    "Completed",
  "Nwabisa Makaluza",       "2019",    "Completed",
  "Joel Gondwe",            "2020",    "Completed",
  "Melt van Schoor",        "2025",    "Completed",
  "Michael Kilumelume",     "Ongoing", "Current",
  "Wawa Nkosi",             "Ongoing", "Current",
) |>
  detailed_entries(what = name, when = year, with = status)
```

# Professional Activities

```{r prof-activities}
tribble(
  ~what, ~details,
  "Memberships",
    "American Economic Association; Economic Society of South Africa; African Finance and Economics Association",
  "Convener",
    "2024 Nobel Symposium on Microdevelopment Research in the Last 20 Years",
  "Referee",
    "American Economic Review; Quarterly Journal of Economics; Oxford Bulletin of Economics and Statistics; World Development; Journal of Development Studies; Empirical Economics; Journal of International Development; Journal of Economic Inequality; Journal of African Economies; South African Journal of Economics; African Review of Economics and Finance; Journal for the Studies in Economics and Econometrics; South African Journal of Economic \\& Management Sciences; Acta Academica",
) |>
  detailed_entries(what = what, why = details)
```
